appName.description: Extension name shown in the browser and store listing.

appDescription.message: A local-first focus assistant for healthier browsing habits.
appDescription.description: Short extension description shown in the browser and store listing.

badgeFallbackDescription.message: A record of a new journey.

badgeAllowlist10Description.message: You kept only the lights you needed through ten journeys.

badgeComebackDescription.message: Coming back is often the hardest part. Welcome back.

badgeFirstHardDescription.message: You chose the deep water and swam all the way through.

badgeFirstScheduleDescription.message: The sea opened on its own at the right time.

badgeFirstSessionDescription.message: Your first focus session made the first ripple.

badgeFiveDayWeekDescription.message: You found a five-day rhythm. The days did not have to be consecutive.

badgeFocus10HoursDescription.message: Ten hours, gathered a little at a time.

badgeFocus50HoursDescription.message: Fifty hours carried you across an ocean.

badgeSteady4wDescription.message: It did not have to be perfect to be steady. That is real progress.

badgeStreak7Description.message: The current flowed for seven days.

blockedEmergencyConfirmWarning.message: Press once more to schedule an emergency end. Go back if you pressed it by mistake.

blockedEmergencyPending.message: Emergency end request saved. The session will end in about 5 minutes.

blockedEmergencyRule.message: Emergency end takes effect after 5 minutes and can be used once per week.

blockedEmergencySaveFailed.message: We couldn't save the request. Please try again.

blockedErrorBlockedPageRequired.message: This action requires the FocusWhale blocked page.

blockedErrorDomainNotBlocked.message: This site is not blocked by the active session.

blockedErrorEmergencyAlreadyUsed.message: You've already used this week's emergency end request.

blockedErrorEmergencyUnavailable.message: Emergency end is only available during an active full-block session.

blockedErrorInvalidDomain.message: We couldn't identify a valid site for temporary access.

blockedErrorInvalidIntent.message: Enter a reason between 1 and 140 characters.

blockedErrorNoMatchingMediumSession.message: Temporary access requires the matching active confirm-to-continue session.

blockedErrorTopLevelPageRequired.message: This action requires a top-level FocusWhale blocked-page tab.

blockedHardNoTemporaryAllow.message: Temporary access is not available in full-block mode.

blockedHeadingStateUnavailable.message: We couldn't check the session status

blockedIntentHelp.message: Write one sentence about why you need this site right now.

blockedIntentLegend.message: Why you need to open it

blockedInvalidExtensionResponse.message: We couldn't verify the extension response.

blockedLoadFailed.message: We couldn't load the blocked page.

blockedMediumPrompt.message: Take a brief check-in before opening this site.

blockedSessionEndedNotice.message: The focus session has ended. You can return to the previous page.

blockedSoftFallback.message: Gentle reminder mode handles this site with a guidance overlay.

blockedStateUnavailable.message: We couldn't check the session status. Please try again shortly.

blockedTemporaryAllowAvailableAnnounceme.message: You can now request a 5-minute temporary allow.

blockedTemporaryAllowFailed.message: We couldn't apply temporary access. Please try again.

blockedTemporaryAllowSuccess.message: You can open this site for 5 minutes. The session rules will apply again afterward.

growthFreezeUsed.message: A droplet shield protected your streak.

growthMigration.message: Your growth system is up to date.

growthSessionEndedEarly.message: The session ended early. No XP was added.

growthStageUp.message: You grew into a $STAGE$. Your accumulated focus made this change.

growthStreakFreshStart.message: A new sea is open. Your past records remain in the growth log.

growthStreakRest.message: Taking a rest. One session today will continue your journey.

growthStreakRestored.message: Welcome back. Your journey continues on day $DAYS$.

analysisSettingsSaveFailed.message: We couldn't save the recommendation analysis settings.

badgeProgressFirstSession.message: Complete your first focus session to unlock this keepsake.

badgeProgressFiveDayWeek.message: Focus on five days in one week to unlock this keepsake.

badgeProgressSteady4w.message: Build your own rhythm over four weeks to unlock this keepsake.

badgeProgressStreak30.message: $DAYS$/30 days of the current are flowing.

badgeProgressStreak7.message: $DAYS$/7 days of the current are flowing.

badgeProgressSurprise.message: It opens quietly during an unexpected journey.

behaviorSaveFailed.message: We couldn't save the blocking behavior.

blockedCategoriesEmpty.message: Category trends will appear as activity builds.

dashboardDescription.message: Local activity that never leaves your browser.

historyPermissionRequired.message: Allow browsing-history access to start local recommendation analysis.

historyPermissionRevokeFailed.message: Could not revoke browsing history access.

localDataClearDescription.message: This clears sessions, intention entries, recommendations, statistics, and the growth log. Synced blocking rules, schedules, and whale growth remain.

localDataClearTitle.message: Clear activity stored on this device?

localDataCleared.message: Activity stored on this device was cleared.

recommendationAddFailed.message: We couldn't add $DOMAIN$ to the blocklist.

recommendationsEmpty.message: There are no recommendation candidates yet.

recommendationsMethod.message: Up to 5,000 URLs from actual visits in the last 30 days are grouped by domain, entirely on this device.

weeklyFocusEmpty.message: Complete a session to see your weekly trend here.

optionsErrorClearDuringSession.message: Local records can be cleared after the active session ends.

optionsErrorConfigLocked.message: Settings cannot be changed during a focus session.

optionsErrorFocusHoursInvalid.message: Choose valid, different start and end times.

optionsErrorHistoryStale.message: Local records changed during analysis, so the result was not saved. Run the analysis again.

optionsErrorListDeleteMissing.message: Could not find the list to delete. Refresh and try again.

optionsErrorListUpdateMissing.message: Could not find this list. Refresh and try again.

optionsErrorRecommendationDomainInvalid.message: Could not identify the domain to block.

optionsErrorScheduleDeleteMissing.message: Could not find the schedule to delete. Refresh and try again.

optionsErrorScheduleIntensityInvalid.message: Choose a valid intensity for this schedule.

optionsErrorScheduleListMissing.message: Could not find the list used by this schedule.

optionsErrorScheduleUpdateMissing.message: Could not find this schedule. Refresh and try again.

optionsErrorSoftDelayRange.message: Choose a gentle prompt delay between 3 and 60 seconds.

optionsErrorTooManyDomains.message: This list has too many domains to activate safely. Remove some domains and try again.

growthAtDeepestSea.message: You're now sailing the deepest sea.

growthLogEmpty.message: There is no growth activity yet.

growthShieldDescription.message: Shields $COUNT$/2 · Earn one after 7 consecutive focus days. If you take a day off, one is used automatically to protect your streak.

petNameSaveFailed.message: We couldn't save the whale's name.

popupActiveStrongestIntensity.message: You're already using the strongest setting.

popupActiveUpgradeHint.message: Upgrade only when you need a stronger setting.

popupCelebrationAckError.message: We couldn't save the completion record. Check your connection and try again.

popupCompletionHeading.message: Your focus helped the whale grow

popupEmergencyConfirmWarning.message: Press once more to schedule an emergency end in 5 minutes.

popupEmergencyRule.message: Emergency end takes effect after 5 minutes and can be used once per week.

popupErrorEmergencyAlreadyUsed.message: You've already used this week's emergency end request.

popupErrorEmergencyUnavailable.message: Emergency end is only available during an active full-block session.

popupErrorIntensityCanOnlyIncrease.message: A running session's intensity can only be increased.

popupErrorInvalidBackgroundResponse.message: We couldn't verify the background response.

popupErrorNoActiveSessionForUpgrade.message: There is no active session to upgrade.

popupErrorSessionAlreadyRunning.message: A session is already running. Use the intensity upgrade action instead.

popupFormDescription.message: Choose once for today, then get started.

popupFormHardNote.message: Emergency end requires two confirmations, takes effect after 5 minutes, and can be used once per week.

popupGrowthFreezeExplanation.message: You earn one shield after 7 consecutive focus days. If you take a day off, one shield is used automatically to protect your streak. You can hold up to 2.

popupGrowthMaxStage.message: You're now sailing the deepest sea.

popupGrowthNeverRegresses.message: Your whale never gets hurt or loses growth.

popupNamePrompt.message: What would you like to call this whale?

popupNoticeEmergencySaveFailed.message: We couldn't save the emergency end request.

popupNoticeIntensityUpgradeFailed.message: We couldn't strengthen the blocking mode.

popupNoticeRefreshFailed.message: We couldn't refresh the session status.

popupPetGrowthHint.message: Complete focus sessions to help your whale grow.

popupPetStageLine0.message: The egg is getting ready to hatch

popupPetStageLine3.message: The blue whale is going deeper

onboardingAllowlistBody.message: Edit the domains that should stay available during a session. FocusWhale adds friction to sites outside this list.

onboardingCloseHint.message: You won't need to keep this page open.

onboardingCompleteSetupBody.message: FocusWhale is ready. Start a session from the popup whenever you choose.

onboardingCompleteStartedBody.message: Your 25-minute session is running. Open the FocusWhale popup any time to check the remaining time.

onboardingCompletionSaveWarning.message: Your session started, but we couldn't save onboarding completion. You can still close this tab and use the popup.

onboardingDomainsHint.message: Enter one domain per line. Pasted links are cleaned automatically.

onboardingEmergencyNote.message: Hard sessions include a delayed emergency exit: after confirmation, the session ends in 5 minutes. You can use it once per week.

onboardingFinishError.message: We couldn't save onboarding completion. Please try again.

onboardingHardBody.message: Keep listed sites blocked for the full session.

onboardingHardAllowlistBody.message: Keep sites outside this allowance blocked for the full session.

onboardingLoadErrorBody.message: Reload this tab to try again. Your existing settings were not changed.

onboardingIntensityBody.message: This choice applies only to the first 25-minute session. FocusWhale never raises it automatically.

onboardingIntensityTitle.message: Choose how much friction you want

onboardingIntroBody.message: FocusWhale adds a thoughtful pause before distracting sites and helps you protect the focus time you choose.

onboardingIntroPetBody.message: Completed sessions help your whale grow. Rest days and missed days never make it shrink or disappear.

onboardingIntroPrivacyBody.message: FocusWhale has no backend. Sessions and optional history analysis stay on this device; synced preferences may use your browser's sync service.

onboardingIntroPrivacyTitle.message: Your browsing stays on this device

onboardingListBody.message: Edit the domains FocusWhale should add friction to during a session. You can change them later in Settings.

onboardingListSaveError.message: We couldn't save the focus list. Please try again.

onboardingMediumBody.message: Wait briefly and state your reason before continuing.

onboardingSoftBody.message: Pause briefly, then continue if you still choose to.

onboardingStartError.message: We couldn't start the session. Your setup is still here, so you can try again.

analysisSectionDescription.message: Choose which hours count as focus time for browsing-history recommendations.

automationSectionDescription.message: Start sessions automatically on the days and times you choose.

behaviorSectionDescription.message: Choose how long the gentle reminder waits.

growthSectionDescription.message: Review the name, growth stage, keepsakes, and recent activity.

listsSectionDescription.message: Open a list to edit blocked or allowed domains.

focusHoursBothRequired.message: Choose both a start and end time for focus hours.

focusHoursMustDiffer.message: Choose different start and end times for focus hours.

listDeleteBlockedBySchedules.message: $COUNT$ schedules use this list. Change or delete them first.

listDeleteDescription.message: Only the $NAME$ list will be deleted.

listDeleteRequiresOne.message: At least one blocking list is required. Add a new list before deleting this one.

scheduleAddFailed.message: We couldn't add the auto-start schedule.

scheduleDeleteDescription.message: Only the $TIME$ schedule will be deleted.

scheduleDeleteFailed.message: We couldn't delete the auto-start schedule.

scheduleListRequired.message: Choose a blocking list for auto-start.

scheduleListRequiredFirst.message: Create a list in Blocking rules before adding an auto-start schedule.

scheduleSaveFailed.message: We couldn't save the auto-start schedule.

scheduleTimesMustDiffer.message: Choose different start and end times.

scheduleTimesRequired.message: Choose both a start and end time.

optionsDescription.message: Manage focus history, blocking rules, auto-start, and whale growth in one place.

optionsLockedDescription.message: Blocking rules, auto-start, and recommendation analysis will be available again when the focus session ends.

optionsLockedTitle.message: Settings are locked during a session

privacySectionDescription.message: Manage data stored on this device and optional permissions.

recommendationsSectionDescription.message: Analyze recent browsing history only on this device.

softPauseDescription.message: This session adds a brief check before opening this site.
